summary: Planning Board Redesign testing completed. Dashboard loads with 5 summary cards, construction stages overview, 4 tabs (All Projects, Materials, Labours, Suppliers). Backend APIs all working (12/13 passed, 1 skipped). Materials and Contractors CRUD fully functional. Vendor creation blocked for Planning role (Procurement-only permission).

minor.issue: Returns 403 for Planning role - Vendor creation is Procurement-only. Planning Board now includes supplier management but backend doesn't allow Planning to create vendors.

integration_issues.issue: Planning users see 'Permission denied' when trying to create supplier. The Add Supplier button is displayed but API returns 403.

Backend_API_Tests.POST /api/materials: PASS - Planning role can create materials
Backend_API_Tests.POST /api/labour-contractors: PASS - Planning role can create contractors

Frontend_UI_Tests.Construction Stages Overview: PASS - Shows 8 construction stages with counts

4 Main Tabs.All Projects: PASS - Table with columns (Project, Client, Stage, Value, Status, Actions)
4 Main Tabs.Materials: PASS - Table with columns (Name, Category, Unit, HSN, Status, Actions)
4 Main Tabs.Labours: PASS - Table with columns (Name, Work Types, Phone, Bank, Actions)
4 Main Tabs.Suppliers: PASS - Table with columns (Supplier, Contact, Materials, GST, Status, Actions)

Materials CRUD.Add Material dialog: PASS - Opens with fields (Name, Category, Unit, Description, HSN Code)
Materials CRUD.Filter buttons (Active/Inactive/All): PASS - All 3 filters visible and working

Labours CRUD.Add Contractor dialog: PASS - Opens with fields (Name, Phone, Email, Address, Work Types, Bank details)

Suppliers CRUD.Add Supplier dialog: PASS - Opens with fields (Company Name, Contact, Phone, Email, Address, GST, Payment Terms, Materials)
Suppliers CRUD.Create supplier: FAIL - Returns 'Permission denied' (403 for Planning role)

features_verified: 5 Summary Cards: Total Projects, New from CRE, Awaiting GM, Working, Pending Actions
Construction Stages overview with 8 stages (Drawing, Yet to Start, Foundation, Basement, Brick Work, Plastering, Finishing, Handover)
4 Tabs: All Projects, Materials, Labours, Suppliers
All Projects tab with projects table and correct columns
Materials tab with table, Add Material button, Active/Inactive/All filter buttons
Material CRUD works (create, view) for Planning role
Labours tab with contractors table and Add Contractor button
Contractor CRUD works (create, view) for Planning role
Suppliers tab with vendors table showing existing data (16 vendors)
Vendor view works for Planning role
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add Planning role to POST /api/vendor-master permission check if Planning should be able to create suppliers - currently Procurement-only
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/vendor-master allows only PROCUREMENT and SUPER_ADMIN roles. Planning Board UI shows Add Supplier button but backend blocks creation. Either remove the button for Planning role or add Planning to allowed roles.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All features work except supplier creation for Planning role)

test_credentials.Planning: Demo Access tab -> Planning button (Suresh Iyer - planning@constructionos.com)

seed_data_creation: Created test materials and contractors via UI and API tests (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning Board redesign fully functional. 5 summary cards, construction stages, 4 tabs working. Materials and Contractors CRUD work for Planning role. Vendors tab shows data but creation is blocked (403) - this is a permission issue in POST /api/vendor-master which only allows PROCUREMENT/SUPER_ADMIN roles.
